image_prompt: The Summit of Scars, The highest, most perilous peak in the known world, perpetually shrouded in swirling storms and rumored to be the source of immense cultivation power. It is the ultimate, almost mythical destination for those seeking true mastery, its slopes littered with the relics and fallen warriors of countless failed ascensions., Dawn breaks over the jagged peaks of the Summit of Scars, painting rising smoke in bruised purple and gold.
